subject: Add ingress controler support to ROBOT
commit_message:
Add ingress controler support to ROBOT

Issue-ID: OOM-2186
Signed-off-by: Lucjan Bryndza <l.bryndza@samsung.com>
Change-Id: Id6b6f6d1a5d9ea83f73b914509098f7711a6418a
